session_summary: Lane 0d completed — SessionTools bridge upgrade. Split the global semaphore into readSemaphore(10) and writeSemaphore(3) based on tool cacheability. Added bridge-level span enrichment with tool.type=builtin and tool.type=mcp attributes for both built-in and MCP execution paths. Propagated cacheable, timeout, and maxConcurrency fields through the registry.tools() return object so the bridge can select the correct semaphore pool. Simplified the bridge to avoid duplicating layers that Lane 0a already added to tool.ts wrap() (per-tool semaphore, timeout, retry). Zero new typecheck errors.
next_steps: Merge Lane 0d. Follow-up: implement tracked Semaphore wrapper for span-enriched available permits (deferred per critic recommendation).

findings.summary: Split global semaphore into readSemaphore(10) and writeSemaphore(3) based on tool cacheability
Added bridge-level span enrichment with tool.type=builtin for built-in tools and tool.type=mcp for MCP tools
Propagated cacheable, timeout, maxConcurrency fields through registry.tools() return object
Removed retry? from Def to avoid dead surface — Lane 0a already added retry object type with full wrap() implementation
